verses.1: Blessed is everyone who fears the LORD,
verses.2: For you will eat the labor of your hands.
verses.3: Your wife will be as a fruitful vine in the innermost parts of your house,
verses.4: Behold, this is how the man who fears the LORD is blessed.
verses.5: May the LORD bless you out of Zion,
verses.6: Yes, may you see your children’s children.
